name: Create Source Article Analysis – Production Candidate

parameters.filterByFormula:
=AND(
  LEN({Article Sources} & "") > 0,
  LEN({Source Article Analysis} & "") = 0,
  {Generate Draft?} = 1
)

nodes.name: Get Articles Ready for Source Analysis

parameters.filterByFormula:
=AND(
  {Article Record ID} = '{{ $json.articleRecordId }}',
  {Use in Draft?} = 1,
  {Ready to Generate Draft?} = 1,
  {Processing Status} = 'Approved'
)

parameters.jsCode:
const article = $('Prepare Article Analysis Context').first().json;
const packetItems = $input.all().filter(item => item.json && item.json.id && item.json.fields);

function text(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.join('\n');
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return '';
  return String(value).trim();
}

const packets = packetItems.map((item, index) => {
  const f = item.json.fields || {};
  return {
    index: index + 1,
    packetRecordId: item.json.id,
    sourcePacketName: text(f['Source Packet Name']),
    processingStatus: text(f['Processing Status']),
    useInDraft: Boolean(f['Use in Draft?']),
    readyToGenerateDraft: Boolean(f['Ready to Generate Draft?']),
    articleRecordId: text(f['Article Record ID']),
    verifiedFacts: text(f['Verified Facts']),
    quoteCandidates: text(f['Quote Candidates']),
    sourceMeaningToRecast: text(f['Source Meaning to Recast']),
    editorialUseNotes: text(f['Editorial Use Notes']),
    promptReadyExtract: text(f['Prompt-Ready Extract']),
  };
});

const packetContext = packets.map((p) => [
  `SOURCE PACKET ${p.index}: ${p.sourcePacketName || p.packetRecordId}`,
  `Verified facts:\n${p.verifiedFacts || 'None'}`,
  `Quote candidates:\n${p.quoteCandidates || 'None'}`,
  `Source meaning to recast:\n${p.sourceMeaningToRecast || 'None'}`,
  `Editorial use notes:\n${p.editorialUseNotes || 'None'}`,
  `Prompt-ready extract:\n${p.promptReadyExtract || 'None'}`,
].join('\n\n')).join('\n\n---\n\n');

const sourceArticleAnalysisPrompt = `
Create a Source Article Analysis record for this BAAD article candidate.

ARTICLE:
Record ID: ${article.articleRecordId}
Title: ${article.title}
Dek: ${article.dek}
Category: ${article.category}
BAAD Publish Categories: ${article.baadPublishCategories.join(', ')}
News Topic: ${article.newsTopic}
Artist / Entity Names: ${article.artistEntityNames}
Artist Candidates: ${article.artistCandidates}
Source URL: ${article.sourceUrl}
Source Outlet: ${article.sourceOutlet}

ARTICLE SOURCE SUMMARY / BODY:
${article.sourceBodySummary || 'Not provided'}

SOURCES COMBINED FOR LLM:
${article.sourcesCombined || article.llmBlockFromSources || 'Not provided'}

APPROVED BAAD SOURCE PACKETS:
${packetContext || 'No approved Source Packets were found. If source evidence is insufficient, mark human review.'}

Return JSON only, with exactly these keys:

{
  "sourceArticleSummary": "",
  "primaryScenario": "",
  "secondaryScenario": "",
  "mainArticleShape": "",
  "articleFocusType": "",
  "articlePurpose": "",
  "currentExhibitionOrProject": "",
  "exhibitionProjectNames": "",
  "venueInstitutionNames": "",
  "datesMentioned": "",
  "timelinessHookType": "",
  "timelinessHookDetails": "",
  "specificArtworkFocus": "",
  "specificArtworkTitles": "",
  "artworkPartOfExhibitionProject": "",
  "artistSubjectNames": "",
  "leadWith": "",
  "mentionExhibitionInDraft": "",
  "mentionSpecificArtworkInDraft": "",
  "quoteWorthPreserving": "",
  "bestQuoteToPreserve": "",
  "whyQuoteMatters": "",
  "bestBAADAngle": "",
  "whyThisMattersForBAAD": "",
  "mustPreserve": "",
  "avoidOveremphasising": "",
  "recommendedBAADBlueprint": "",
  "recommendedBAADArticleShape": "",
  "needsHumanReview": true,
  "humanReviewReason": "",
  "analysisStatus": "Complete",
  "baadCategories": [],
  "mediaFilmHook": "",
  "mediaScenario": "",
  "mediaType": "",
  "filmVideoTitle": "",
  "filmVideoPlatform": "",
  "mentionFilmInDraft": "",
  "filmAsMainHookOrSecondaryHook": "",
  "filmMediaNotes": "",
  "multiArtistArticle": "",
  "artistRelationshipType": "",
  "baadAnchorArtists": "",
  "nonAnchorArtists": "",
  "framingBalance": "",
  "mentionNonAnchorArtist": "",
  "nonAnchorFramingNote": "",
  "baadAnchorOpeningRule": ""
}

Airtable-valid values:

primaryScenario:
- Visual artist spotlight
- Exhibition / project spotlight
- Artwork-led article
- Material / process story
- Cultural / historical memory story
- Public art / installation story
- Book / publication story
- Design / object story
- Event / opportunity brief
- Other / unclear

mainArticleShape:
- artist practice spotlight
- exhibition/project spotlight
- artwork-led spotlight
- material/process spotlight
- cultural memory/history spotlight
- book/publication spotlight
- design spotlight
- public art/installation spotlight
- event/opportunity brief
- unclear

articleFocusType:
- artist practice
- specific artwork
- exhibition/project
- material/process
- cultural memory/history
- book/publication
- design object/project
- public art/installation
- event/opportunity
- unclear
- site-specific sound installation

yes/no style fields must use only:
- Yes
- No
- Partial
- Briefly
- Unclear
depending on the exact field.

leadWith:
- visual detail
- material/process
- artist
- artwork
- exhibition/project
- quote
- venue/institution
- cultural context
- unclear
- site/sound/spatial experience

recommendedBAADBlueprint:
- BAAD Short Visual Art Spotlight
- BAAD Short Visual Design Spotlight
- BAAD Exhibition / Project Spotlight
- BAAD Artwork-Led Spotlight
- BAAD Material Practice Spotlight
- BAAD Cultural / Historical Memory Spotlight
- BAAD Public Art / Installation Spotlight
- BAAD Book / Publication Spotlight
- BAAD Event / Opportunity Brief
- Needs Human Review

analysisStatus:
- Complete
- Needs Review

mediaFilmHook:
- Yes
- No
- Unclear

mediaScenario:
- Artist film / documentary spotlight
- Art21 segment
- Studio visit film
- Artist interview video
- Museum video feature
- Performance documentation
- Art film
- Film review / cinema article
- No media scenario
- Unclear

mediaType:
- Art21 segment
- documentary
- short film
- artist interview video
- studio visit film
- performance documentation
- museum video
- gallery video
- YouTube film
- other
- unclear

filmAsMainHookOrSecondaryHook:
- Main hook
- Secondary hook
- Access note only
- No film hook
- Unclear

multiArtistArticle:
- Yes
- No
- Unclear

artistRelationshipType:
- solo artist
- duo / two-person exhibition
- collaborative duo
- group exhibition
- artist collective
- artist + curator
- artist + institution
- unclear
- solo exhibition

framingBalance:
- BAAD-anchor led
- equal duo framing
- project-led with BAAD anchor emphasis
- group overview with BAAD anchor emphasis
- needs human review
- single BAAD-anchor artist

mentionNonAnchorArtist:
- Yes
- No
- Briefly
- Equal framing
- Unclear

Rules:
- Use approved Source Packets as the highest-priority evidence layer.
- Use Article Sources as supporting context.
- Do not invent missing facts.
- If no approved Source Packets are available, set needsHumanReview to true unless Article Sources are strong enough.
- If the article concerns a current exhibition/project, identify names, venue, dates, artist, and why it matters.
- If the article concerns multiple artists, apply BAAD-anchor framing carefully and avoid implying sole authorship.
- If the material is high-copying-risk, explain what to avoid.
- Must Preserve should contain only source-backed facts or constraints.
- Avoid Overemphasising should warn against weak claims, unsupported interpretation, promotional framing, or misleading focus.
`.trim();

return [{
  json: {
    ...article,
    packets,
    sourcePacketsCount: packets.length,
    sourceArticleAnalysisPrompt,
  },
}];

values.content:
You are BAAD's Source Article Analysis editor for Black Art & Design.

Your task is to analyse an article candidate using verified source material and approved BAAD Source Packets.

You must not write the article.

You must return strict JSON only.

Use the source material to decide:
- what kind of BAAD article this should become
- what facts are safe to preserve
- what angle BAAD should take
- what should not be overemphasised
- whether human review is needed before drafting
- whether the article should be framed around an artist, exhibition, artwork, material/process, film/media, public installation, book/publication, or opportunity

Never invent facts.
Never create unsupported career claims.
Never turn promotional language into BAAD opinion.
Never copy source phrasing.
If the source material is thin, ambiguous, sensitive, or too promotional, set needsHumanReview to true.

parameters.jsCode:
const original = $('Build Source Article Analysis Prompt').first().json;

const output = $json.output;
let text = '';

if (Array.isArray(output)) {
  const message = output.find(o => o.type === 'message') || output[0];
  const content = message?.content || [];
  const textPart = Array.isArray(content)
    ? content.find(c => c.type === 'output_text') || content[0]
    : null;
  text = textPart?.text || '';
}

if (!text && typeof $json.text === 'string') text = $json.text;
if (!text && typeof $json.output === 'string') text = $json.output;

if (!text) {
  throw new Error('Could not find OpenAI output text.');
}

text = text
  .trim()
  .replace(/^\`\`\`json\s*/i, '')
  .replace(/^\`\`\`\s*/i, '')
  .replace(/\`\`\`$/i, '')
  .trim();

let raw;
try {
  raw = JSON.parse(text);
} catch (err) {
  throw new Error(`Could not parse Source Article Analysis JSON: ${err.message}\n\nRaw text:\n${text}`);
}

function cleanText(value) {
  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.filter(Boolean).join('\n');
  if (value === null || value === undefined) return '';
  return String(value).trim();
}

function oneOf(value, allowed, fallback) {
  const text = cleanText(value);
  return allowed.includes(text) ? text : fallback;
}

function bool(value) {
  return value === true || value === 'true';
}

const yesNoUnclear = ['Yes', 'No', 'Unclear'];
const yesNoPartialUnclear = ['Yes', 'No', 'Partial', 'Unclear'];
const yesNoBrieflyUnclear = ['Yes', 'No', 'Briefly', 'Unclear'];

const analysis = {
  sourceArticleSummary: cleanText(raw.sourceArticleSummary),
  primaryScenario: oneOf(raw.primaryScenario, [
    'Visual artist spotlight',
    'Exhibition / project spotlight',
    'Artwork-led article',
    'Material / process story',
    'Cultural / historical memory story',
    'Public art / installation story',
    'Book / publication story',
    'Design / object story',
    'Event / opportunity brief',
    'Other / unclear',
  ], 'Other / unclear'),
  secondaryScenario: cleanText(raw.secondaryScenario),
  mainArticleShape: oneOf(raw.mainArticleShape, [
    'artist practice spotlight',
    'exhibition/project spotlight',
    'artwork-led spotlight',
    'material/process spotlight',
    'cultural memory/history spotlight',
    'book/publication spotlight',
    'design spotlight',
    'public art/installation spotlight',
    'event/opportunity brief',
    'unclear',
  ], 'unclear'),
  articleFocusType: oneOf(raw.articleFocusType, [
    'artist practice',
    'specific artwork',
    'exhibition/project',
    'material/process',
    'cultural memory/history',
    'book/publication',
    'design object/project',
    'public art/installation',
    'event/opportunity',
    'unclear',
    'site-specific sound installation',
  ], 'unclear'),
  articlePurpose: cleanText(raw.articlePurpose),
  currentExhibitionOrProject: oneOf(raw.currentExhibitionOrProject, yesNoUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  exhibitionProjectNames: cleanText(raw.exhibitionProjectNames),
  venueInstitutionNames: cleanText(raw.venueInstitutionNames),
  datesMentioned: cleanText(raw.datesMentioned),
  timelinessHookType: oneOf(raw.timelinessHookType, [
    'current exhibition',
    'current project',
    'current book/publication',
    'event/opportunity',
    'artist practice only',
    'none',
    'unclear',
    'current exhibition / commission',
  ], 'unclear'),
  timelinessHookDetails: cleanText(raw.timelinessHookDetails),
  specificArtworkFocus: oneOf(raw.specificArtworkFocus, yesNoPartialUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  specificArtworkTitles: cleanText(raw.specificArtworkTitles),
  artworkPartOfExhibitionProject: oneOf(raw.artworkPartOfExhibitionProject, yesNoPartialUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  artistSubjectNames: cleanText(raw.artistSubjectNames),
  leadWith: oneOf(raw.leadWith, [
    'visual detail',
    'material/process',
    'artist',
    'artwork',
    'exhibition/project',
    'quote',
    'venue/institution',
    'cultural context',
    'unclear',
    'site/sound/spatial experience',
  ], 'unclear'),
  mentionExhibitionInDraft: oneOf(raw.mentionExhibitionInDraft, yesNoBrieflyUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  mentionSpecificArtworkInDraft: oneOf(raw.mentionSpecificArtworkInDraft, yesNoBrieflyUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  quoteWorthPreserving: oneOf(raw.quoteWorthPreserving, yesNoUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  bestQuoteToPreserve: cleanText(raw.bestQuoteToPreserve),
  whyQuoteMatters: cleanText(raw.whyQuoteMatters),
  bestBAADAngle: cleanText(raw.bestBAADAngle),
  whyThisMattersForBAAD: cleanText(raw.whyThisMattersForBAAD),
  mustPreserve: cleanText(raw.mustPreserve),
  avoidOveremphasising: cleanText(raw.avoidOveremphasising),
  recommendedBAADBlueprint: oneOf(raw.recommendedBAADBlueprint, [
    'BAAD Short Visual Art Spotlight',
    'BAAD Short Visual Design Spotlight',
    'BAAD Exhibition / Project Spotlight',
    'BAAD Artwork-Led Spotlight',
    'BAAD Material Practice Spotlight',
    'BAAD Cultural / Historical Memory Spotlight',
    'BAAD Public Art / Installation Spotlight',
    'BAAD Book / Publication Spotlight',
    'BAAD Event / Opportunity Brief',
    'Needs Human Review',
  ], 'Needs Human Review'),
  recommendedBAADArticleShape: cleanText(raw.recommendedBAADArticleShape),
  needsHumanReview: bool(raw.needsHumanReview),
  humanReviewReason: cleanText(raw.humanReviewReason),
  analysisStatus: oneOf(raw.analysisStatus, ['Complete', 'Needs Review'], bool(raw.needsHumanReview) ? 'Needs Review' : 'Complete'),
  baadCategories: Array.isArray(raw.baadCategories) && raw.baadCategories.length
    ? raw.baadCategories.filter(v => ['Art', 'Design', 'Film', 'Books', 'Architecture', 'Fashion', 'Performance', 'Photography'].includes(v))
    : original.baadPublishCategories,
  mediaFilmHook: oneOf(raw.mediaFilmHook, yesNoUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  mediaScenario: oneOf(raw.mediaScenario, [
    'Artist film / documentary spotlight',
    'Art21 segment',
    'Studio visit film',
    'Artist interview video',
    'Museum video feature',
    'Performance documentation',
    'Art film',
    'Film review / cinema article',
    'No media scenario',
    'Unclear',
  ], 'Unclear'),
  mediaType: oneOf(raw.mediaType, [
    'Art21 segment',
    'documentary',
    'short film',
    'artist interview video',
    'studio visit film',
    'performance documentation',
    'museum video',
    'gallery video',
    'YouTube film',
    'other',
    'unclear',
  ], 'unclear'),
  filmVideoTitle: cleanText(raw.filmVideoTitle),
  filmVideoPlatform: cleanText(raw.filmVideoPlatform),
  mentionFilmInDraft: oneOf(raw.mentionFilmInDraft, yesNoBrieflyUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  filmAsMainHookOrSecondaryHook: oneOf(raw.filmAsMainHookOrSecondaryHook, [
    'Main hook',
    'Secondary hook',
    'Access note only',
    'No film hook',
    'Unclear',
  ], 'Unclear'),
  filmMediaNotes: cleanText(raw.filmMediaNotes),
  multiArtistArticle: oneOf(raw.multiArtistArticle, yesNoUnclear, 'Unclear'),
  artistRelationshipType: oneOf(raw.artistRelationshipType, [
    'solo artist',
    'duo / two-person exhibition',
    'collaborative duo',
    'group exhibition',
    'artist collective',
    'artist + curator',
    'artist + institution',
    'unclear',
    'solo exhibition',
  ], 'unclear'),
  baadAnchorArtists: cleanText(raw.baadAnchorArtists),
  nonAnchorArtists: cleanText(raw.nonAnchorArtists),
  framingBalance: oneOf(raw.framingBalance, [
    'BAAD-anchor led',
    'equal duo framing',
    'project-led with BAAD anchor emphasis',
    'group overview with BAAD anchor emphasis',
    'needs human review',
    'single BAAD-anchor artist',
  ], 'needs human review'),
  mentionNonAnchorArtist: oneOf(raw.mentionNonAnchorArtist, ['Yes', 'No', 'Briefly', 'Equal framing', 'Unclear'], 'Unclear'),
  nonAnchorFramingNote: cleanText(raw.nonAnchorFramingNote),
  baadAnchorOpeningRule: cleanText(raw.baadAnchorOpeningRule),
};

const analysisName = [
  'Source Analysis',
  original.title || original.sourceOutlet || 'Untitled Article',
].filter(Boolean).join(' — ').slice(0, 250);

return {
  ...original,
  analysisName,
  sourceTitle: original.title,
  analysis,
};

main.node: Get Articles Ready for Source Analysis
